name: Larvotto Resources Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3450, stop A$1.0791, target A$1.5800 (0.88:1) — then trail it.
